page: Microsoft Azure EC96ads_cc_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECADCCV5 family. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 672.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 7.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server type includes 3686 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. It does not include bundled GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention, while the local storage capacity supports rapid data access.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and substantial local storage capacity, this instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for resource-intensive workloads that require large memory footprints without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware. It is designed for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale database deployments, enterprise applications, and data warehousing operations.
description: Microsoft Azure EC96ads_cc_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance from the ECADCCV5 family, configured with 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it features 672.0 GB of system memory, providing 7.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 3686 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, though it lacks bundled GPUs and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention, while the local storage capacity supports rapid data access. This high-density memory and storage profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-effective for large-scale enterprise applications, database hosting, and data warehousing.
